eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 8:13 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 8:13 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert - Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice for zone JAC-109 near 18000 block East Evans Creek due to East Evans Creek Fire. Monitor local news sources for evacuations and incident information.
